TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Singsiya Itiniay i Hualien Cen no Hualien ko Singsiya a niyaro', 725 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,092 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 16% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 345 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 84% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,747 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis13%, Tayal1%, Truku1%.
S.PHON: siŇčsija itiniaj i ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u siŇčsija a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis**%, taja…ĺ*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%.
S.FORM: Singsiya Itiniay i Hualien Cen no Hualien ko Singsiya a niyaro', 725 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,092 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 16% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 345 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 84% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,747 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis13%, Tayal1%, Truku1%.
S.PHON: siŇčsija itiniaj i ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u siŇčsija a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis**%, taja…ĺ*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%.
